TextENGNew: And so, the following day.
K wielded his strength with an authority befitting the title 'Dark King' — and brought one fantasy punishment game after another into reality.
None of the club members could stand against his overwhelming power.
Every plan of Mion's was crushed,
and even Rena's full 'kyute mode' couldn't come close.
Satoko's traps were like sparrow snares set for an elephant.
All Rika could do was pat the heads of her defeated companions.
There was no breaking through this situation with the club members alone!!
Realizing this, Mion called on Chie-sensei for help — but K, brimming with the power of fantasy, subdued her with no more effort than twisting a baby's arm!
"Th-That's... This punishment game is simply too much!"
"Maebara-kun, can't you think of something else?!"
"Hmmmm~~~~ Chie-senseiiii? You teach us to follow rules — and now you'd bend them yourself? Hmm~~~??"
"All you have to do is turn around, stick your bottom out, and write a figure-eight in the air. During tomorrow's art class~~!! You'll just be posing as our sketching model."
"B-But... that's... that's so embarrassing...! You're being too cruel, Maebara-kun...!"
Compared to the club members, who had steeled themselves to some degree for punishment games, Chie-sensei seemed to have considerably more resistance.
...But even as she stubbornly refused, she couldn't defy the supreme law of this club — the absolute right of the victor — and her resolve gradually began to crumble.
Rattle!!
Just then, the classroom door swung open — and in walked the principal.
Everyone believed the school's ultimate trump card had arrived to save them.
But from the principal's lips came words of unexpected strictness... "I suppose there's nothing to be done."
changeReason: Old omits the principal's actual quoted words ('I suppose there's nothing to be done') which are present in the Japanese.

TextENGNew: "Ku ku ku ku... Principal~~!! I knew you'd understand!!"
"...Oh no~. ...I was sure the principal would blow this whole situation away with one swing of his iron fists...!"
changeReason: The original omits '一発で' (with a single blow) and '吹っ飛ばして' (blow away), while the new captures the exaggerated one-punch imagery from the Japanese.

TextENGNew: Even witnessing the spectacular sight of the entire club dressed in their extravagant punishment game outfits, the principal didn't so much as blink. ...As expected of him.
Apparently intrigued by the punishment game awaiting Chie-sensei, he turned to Rena and asked her about it.
changeReason: The original omits that the principal's interest was specifically in Chie-sensei's punishment game (知恵先生が負う罰ゲーム), which provides important context for the scene.

TextENGNew: "...Umm... What was it again?"
Rena turned back to look at Satoko and Rika, and all three tilted their heads.
"Umm... it was... something about sticking her bottom out and then... what was it?"
"No, that wasn't it, Rena-san. I believe he said something about sketching."
"...In other words, Keiichi is trying to put Chie's bottom on public display."
changeReason: Old uses 'extorting' for 見世物にしようとしている (trying to put on display/make a spectacle of) — wrong action described, changing what Keiichi is accused of doing.

TextENGNew: The last sound Keiichi heard was the sound effect of the principal unleashing his three-gauge special technique...
"Let this be a lesson! Fantasies are to be enjoyed privately! You must not inflict them upon others!"
"...Uuu, I'm sorry, Sensei... I'll be more careful from now on..."
After that, it is said Keiichi honored that lesson and kept his fantasies strictly to himself.
"...Ehehehehehehehe~~~~☆"
"Maebara-kun!! No creepy laughing in the middle of class!! And please — don't look at your teacher with those eyes!"
Once again, today was a supremely happy day for K☆
